response.original_title: How do I stop TotalAV from taking money from my account? {{Billing Help Guide}}
response.overview: To stop TotalAV from taking money from your account, you 1 (855 )) 783 7555 must disable the automatic renewal feature at least 24 1 (855 )) 783 7555 hours before your next billing date. Start by logging 1 (855 )) 783 7555 into your official dashboard at my.totalav.com and navigating to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 the "Billing" or "Subscriptions" tab. From there, you can 1 (855 )) 783 7555 follow the prompts to manage your plan and opt-out 1 (855 )) 783 7555 of recurring payments. If the online dashboard is unresponsive 1 (855 )) 783 7555 or you encounter multiple retention pop-ups, you can call 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have a support agent manually 1 (855 )) 783 7555 terminate the billing cycle and ensure your payment method 1 (855 )) 783 7555 is removed from their active files.
